caption: A man wearing a green t-shirt and a green baseball cap sits in a room decorated with framed photos on the wall and clothing on racks in the background. He wears over-the-ear headphones and speaks into a large black microphone positioned in front of him. His green shirt features the white text "I NEVER DO SHIT". In the background, a white mannequin is visible wearing a white shirt. On-screen graphics include a circular logo with the text "ONE" and a red logo that reads "RECORDING". Across the sequence, the man's facial expression and mouth movements shift as he speaks, while the camera remains stationary, maintaining a consistent medium shot of the man from the waist up.
